ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "callsign" TEXT /* Call sign of the flight */,
  "aircraft_reg" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "aircraft_address" TEXT /* Hex address of the aircraft */,
  "adep" TEXT /* Departure airport ICAO code */,
  "ades" TEXT /* Arrival airport ICAO code */,
  "ssr_codes" TEXT /* SSR codes for the flight */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start time of the flight period */,
  "period_finish" TEXT /* Finish time of the flight period */,
  "source_ids" TEXT /* Source IDs for the flight data */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "flight_status_code" TEXT /* Code representing the status of the flight */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the cargo on the flight */,
  "fuel_consumption" TEXT /* Fuel consumption of the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot operating the flight */,
  "copilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot operating the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_ades FOREIGN KEY ("ades") REFERENCES airports ("icao_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_adep FOREIGN KEY ("adep") REFERENCES airports ("icao_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_reg FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_reg") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_reg"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_copilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("copilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_reg" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "aircraft_address" TEXT /* Hex address of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year the aircraft was manufactured */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the aircraft */,
  "max_cargo_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum cargo capacity of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssr_codes" (
  "ssr_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSR code */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the SSR code belongs to */,
  "ssr_code" TEXT /* SSR code value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssr_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssr_codes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_plans" (
  "flight_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight plan */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the plan belongs to */,
  "flight_route" TEXT /* Route of the flight */,
  "flight_altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the flight */,
  "flight_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the flight */,
  "estimated_fuel_consumption" TEXT /* Estimated fuel consumption for the flight plan */,
  "estimated_fuel_weight" TEXT /* Estimated fuel weight for the flight plan */,
  "estimated_cargo_weight" TEXT /* Estimated cargo weight for the flight plan */,
  "estimated_passenger_count" INTEGER /* Estimated number of passengers for the flight plan */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the flight plan in minutes */,
  "planned_departure_time" TEXT /* Planned departure time of the flight */,
  "planned_arrival_time" TEXT /* Planned arrival time of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_plans_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the weather data belongs to */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., cloudy, sunny) */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature */,
  "pressure" TEXT /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility distance */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "gust_speed" INTEGER /* Wind gust speed */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Amount of precipitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_control" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic control data point */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the ATC data belongs to */,
  "atc_center" TEXT /* ATC center */,
  "atc_controller" TEXT /* ATC controller */,
  "atc_command" TEXT /* ATC command given to the flight */,
  "command_time" TEXT /* Time the ATC command was given */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the ATC command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_control_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking data point */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the tracking data belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the flight */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the flight */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* Altitude of the flight */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the flight */,
  "heading" INTEGER /* Heading of the flight */,
  "track_time" TEXT /* Time of the tracking data point */,
  "track_source" TEXT /* Source of the tracking data */,
  "track_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the tracking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_tracking_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the status update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "status_source" TEXT /* Source of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the pilot */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight operation */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation */,
  "operation_time" TEXT /* Time of the operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_operations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
